name: Raisin Cake from the Pantry
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sifted flour, resifted with 1 teaspoon baking soda and 1/2 teaspoon salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the raisins with sugar, water, shortening, and spices in a saucepan.
2. Simmer for 1 minute.
3. Cool to room temperature.
4. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees F (150 C).
5. Lightly grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Combine the cooled raisin mixture with flour, nuts, salt, cinnamon, and ginger in a large bowl until well mixed.
7. Transfer the batter to the prepared baking pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out dry.
9. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes before cutting into squares.
Yield: 12-16 squares
